news.headline: Summary: Report forecasts market for High-Density Interconnect PCB for Defence and Space Apps till 2032, highlighting its crucial role and versatility.
news.summary: A recently added report on "High-density Interconnect PCB for Defence and Space Applications - Market and Technology Forecast to 2032" by ResearchAndMarkets.com emphasizes the significance of High-Density Interconnect (HDI) PCBs in modern defense and space technologies. These advanced PCBs have evolved into essential components for next-generation defense and space equipment, showcasing their versatility and advanced features. The shift from commercial to military and aerospace sectors underscores their increasing demand for miniaturization.

news.headline: McEwen Copper receives environmental permit for Los Azules copper project, key step towards construction.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 3, 2024, McEwen Copper Inc., a subsidiary of McEwen Mining Inc. listed on NYSE as MUX and TSX as MUX, has received approval for the Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) for its Los Azules copper project. The Environmental Impact Statement (EIS) signifies the ministerial resolution endorsing the EIA, a critical step towards achieving feasibility, construction, and eventual operation of the project.

news.headline: Wafer marking equipment is crucial in semiconductor manufacturing for traceability & quality control. As the semiconductor industry grows, demand for advanced, automated wafer marking systems is increasing. Key benefits include: traceability, quality control, authentication, counterfeit prevention, and regulatory compliance. The adoption of automation and enhanced traceability features are key trends shaping the market.
news.summary: The article discusses the importance of wafer marking equipment in semiconductor manufacturing. These systems apply unique identifiers to wafers for traceability, quality control, and counterfeit prevention. Benefits include real-time monitoring and batch identification. The semiconductor industry's growth drives demand for advanced wafer marking solutions to meet evolving needs. Automation is a key trend, enhancing efficiency and precision in production. As regulatory standards tighten, the demand for compliant wafer marking equipment is expected to increase. The industry's emphasis on traceability and product identification ensures continued growth in demand for these systems. The article details how automation and enhanced traceability features are key drivers in the semiconductor manufacturing sector.

news.headline: RAD-R, an AITX subsidiary, debuts new package theft prevention function in RADCam™, boosting residential security.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that a total of 500 individuals from the local community have been affected by the sudden spike in unemployment rates. This increase has seen an alarming rise of 15% in the number of jobless individuals in the area. The local unemployment rate now stands at 7.5%, which is a significant surge compared to the previous rate of 6.5%. The authorities have expressed their concerns over the impact this rise in unemployment will have on the community and are working on implementing measures to address this pressing issue.

news.headline: 365 Data Centers completes debt refinancing in Norwalk, Conn. to back revenue growth, enhancing operations.
news.summary: 365 Data Centers, based in Norwalk, Connecticut, has recently announced the refinancing of a section of its existing debt in order to bolster its revenue growth strategies.

news.headline: Assessments 24x7 and Center for Internal Change's Team Dimensions Assessment gets ASI Certification for accuracy and validation.
news.summary: Assessments 24x7, a leading SaaS assessment technology firm, in partnership with the Center for Internal Change, has announced that their Team Dimensions Assessment has gained certification from the Assessment Standards Institute (ASI). This certification confirms the tool's precision, dependability, and efficiency, offering scientific validation of its capabilities. The Team Dimensions Assessment aims to enhance team synergy and productivity. The announcement was made in San Diego, highlighting the commitment to providing high-quality assessment solutions.

news.headline: Fairfax India buys 10% more stake in Bangalore International Airport Limited.
news.summary: Last month, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the United States reached a record low of 3.5%, the lowest it has been in 50 years. This marked a decrease from the previous month's rate of 3.7%. Additionally, the economy added 266,000 jobs in November, surpassing economists' expectations of 180,000. This growth was primarily driven by gains in the healthcare, leisure, and hospitality sectors. Overall, the strong job market and low unemployment rate indicate a healthy economy and positive outlook for the country's labor force.

news.headline: Crypto phishing scams predicted to increase during holiday season. Losses fell by 53% in November. Beware of new threats.
news.summary: In November, losses from crypto phishing scams decreased by 53%, but there are concerns as the Christmas holiday shopping period may offer fresh avenues for hackers to exploit.

news.headline: AVAIO Digital's 92MW "Perseus" Data Center in Pittsburg Technology Park approved, major milestone reached.
news.summary: A digital company named AVAIO Digital has received approval for their "Perseus" Data Center in Pittsburg Technology Park in Stamford, Connecticut. The data center will have a capacity of 92MW.

news.headline: Eco Oro Minerals Corp. confirms availability of Meeting Materials for annual meeting on Dec. 19, 2024 at 9:30 am PT. Access on SEDAR+.
news.summary: Vancouver-based Eco Oro Minerals Corp. (CSE:EOM) has revealed that due to the ongoing Canadian postal strike, the management information circular and associated materials for the upcoming annual general meeting scheduled for December 19, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. (Pacific Time) can now be accessed on the Company's profile on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca. Shareholders are advised to obtain the Meeting Materials directly from the provided website amid the postal disruption.

news.headline: South Korea's Yoon: Government administration has been paralysed because of opposition party conduct.
RJW Logistics Group, a retail logistics provider, gets investment from Berkshire Partners to enhance services and expand.
news.summary: RJW Logistics Group, a key player in retail logistics solutions for consumer packaged goods, has disclosed a recent strategic investment from Berkshire Partners, a private equity firm based in Boston. This move is poised to bolster RJW's capabilities, allowing enhanced customer service, performance, innovations, and an expansion of its geographic footprint. The investment signals a positive trajectory for RJW as it continues to make waves in the industry.

news.headline: Perfect Moment & United Repair Centre launch 'Perfect for Longer' repair service for customers across UK & Europe. NYSE American: PMNT partners with CEO Thami Schweichler.
news.summary: Perfect Moment Ltd. has formed a collaboration with United Repair Centre to introduce a personalized repair service, "Perfect for Longer," for its customers. As a leading luxury skiwear and lifestyle brand on NYSE American under the symbol PMNT, Perfect Moment merges high performance with stylish designs. The partnership announcement was made by United Repair Centre's CEO, Thami Schweichler, expressing delight in partnering with the renowned brand. This venture aims to provide tailor-made repair services catered specifically to Perfect Moment customers.

news.headline: South Korean President Yoon declares martial law.
Evoke Pharma gets 2 US patent allowances for GIMOTI® nasal spray, enhancing its IP estate. $EVOK
news.summary: In Solana Beach, California, on December 3, 2024, Evoke Pharma, Inc. disclosed that they have obtained notices of allowance for two U.S. patent applications from the United States Patent and Trademark Office. This development signifies a significant expansion of the company's intellectual property portfolio concerning GIMOTI® (metoclopramide) nasal spray. Evoke Pharma, Inc., listed on the NASDAQ as EVOK, is a specialty pharmaceutical enterprise concentrating on gastrointestinal diseases. Their primary focus is on GIMOTI®, a nasal spray formulation of metoclopramide.

news.headline: Zscaler stock fell as investors were disappointed by in-line revenue guidance after CFO announced retirement.
news.summary: Following the release of its fiscal Q1 earnings report, Zscaler's stock experienced a decline. Although the company surpassed revenue and earnings estimates, its revenue guidance for the next quarter failed to impress investors, resulting in a negative market reaction. Additionally, the news of the CFO's retirement added to the uncertainty surrounding the company. This development was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Salesforce set to report Q3 earnings, analysts seeking fiscal 2026 guidance amid software stock rebound in late 2024.
news.summary: During the upcoming Q3 earnings report, analysts will be paying attention to the preliminary fiscal 2026 guidance for Salesforce stock. This comes as software stocks have been rebounding in late 2024, showing promising trends in the market.

news.headline: Credo Technology stock surges on strong Q2 earnings & guidance amid AI growth, attracting new cloud customers.
news.summary: Credo Technology experienced a significant surge in its stock following impressive fiscal second-quarter earnings and robust guidance. The company celebrated reaching an AI "inflection point" and attracting a wave of new cloud customers. This positive momentum led to a substantial increase in the company's stock value, generating attention from investors. The strong performance in Q2 was underscored by numbers that exceeded expectations, demonstrating a promising outlook for the company's future growth potential.

news.headline: Tesla China registrations spike, leading to strong quarter forecast but stock price is weighed down; stock rallied over 40% post-Trump election.
news.summary: Following Donald Trump's victory in the presidential election, Tesla stock has surged by over 40%. Registrations for Tesla in China have also seen a significant increase, indicating a strong quarter ahead for the electric vehicle giant. However, this positive news has not been reflected in the stock price, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Article discusses tariffs, their purpose, and impact. President-elect Donald Trump, "Tariff Man," reiterates focus.
news.summary: A tariff is a tax imposed on imported goods with the aim of boosting domestic industry and protecting local jobs. President-elect Donald Trump, known as "Tariff Man," is a proponent of tariffs and their role in global trade. While the intention of tariffs is to benefit the domestic economy, ultimately the burden falls on consumers who end up paying higher prices for imported goods. With tariffs being a key tool in trade policies, understanding their impacts on businesses and individuals is crucial.

news.headline: SIMPPLE Ltd. partners with Elite VDP for distribution in Vietnam, expanding technology offerings in FM sector.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Singapore-based SIMPPLE Ltd. (NASDAQ: SPPL) revealed a significant partnership development. The tech company known for its innovations in facilities management (FM) shared news of a strategic agreement between its Singapore subsidiary and Elite VDP Co., Ltd. in Vietnam. This newly inked deal involves the distribution of the SIMPPLE Ecosystem in Vietnam, marking a notable expansion in the region.

news.headline: Worthington Steel to acquire 52% stake in Italy-based Sitem Group, with potential for increased ownership.
news.summary: COLUMBUS, Ohio - In a recent development, Worthington Steel has announced its acquisition of a majority stake, approximately 52%, in Sitem Group. This deal includes the provision for Worthington Steel to potentially raise its ownership share in the coming times.

news.headline: Worthington Steel to acquire 52% stake in Italy's Sitem Group with an option for increased ownership.
news.summary: A significant development has taken place in Columbus, Ohio as Worthington Steel has announced its acquisition of around 52% ownership in the Sitem Group. This move not only grants Worthington Steel a major stake in Sitem Group but also provides them with the option to potentially increase their ownership further down the line.

news.headline: YY Group Holding creates YY Smart Tech to boost IT services; aims to improve capabilities and offer advanced solutions.
news.summary: Singapore, December 3, 2024 - YY Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH) has recently launched YY Smart Tech Pte Ltd. ("YY Smart Tech" or "YYST") to centralize and improve IT services. The establishment of this new technology division is intended to bolster YY Group's tech expertise and provide innovative IT solutions to clients. This strategic move underscores the company's commitment to advancing its technological offerings and catering to external customers.

news.headline: Lipella Pharma in CUREUS: Study on Non-Steroid treatment for Oral Lichen Planus published.
news.summary: Lipella Pharmaceuticals has recently shared a study in CUREUS focusing on alternative therapies for Oral Lichen Planus. The publication provides insights into the efficacy of non-steroidal treatments for this condition. This research is significant as it offers new perspectives on managing Oral Lichen Planus without the use of steroids. This study sheds light on the potential benefits of alternative therapies, marking a crucial advancement in the field of oral health.

news.headline: Automated Room Controls Inc. (ARC), subsidiary of Ozop Energy Solutions, Inc., secures crucial certifications, advancing to full production.
news.summary: In Warwick, NY, on December 3, 2024, Automated Room Controls Inc. (ARC), a subsidiary of Ozop Energy Solutions, Inc. (OZSC), has attained crucial certifications for its lighting controls system. This achievement, attained without any necessary revisions, highlights the rigorous technical standards and excellence in ARC’s engineering practices. This milestone signifies a significant advancement towards mass production.

news.headline: SeaStar Medical activates 13th site in NEUTRALIZE-AKI trial at Sentara Norfolk General Hospital, with 65 subjects enrolled.
news.summary: SeaStar Medical Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: ICU) has disclosed the activation of Sentara Norfolk General Hospital as the thirteenth active site in its NEUTRALIZE-AKI pivotal trial. In November, nine critically ill adult acute kidney injury (AKI) patients were enrolled in the trial, bringing the total enrollment to 65 subjects. The NEUTRALIZE-AKI trial aims to evaluate the safety and efficacy of the Company’s proprietary therapeutic Selective Cytopheretic Device (SCD) in 200 adult patients with AKI in the intensive care unit (ICU) who are receiving continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT).

news.headline: Recursion doses first patient in Phase 1/2 trial of REC-1245 for solid tumors and lymphoma.
news.summary: A significant update was shared today by Recursion (NASDAQ: RXRX), a prominent TechBio company in Salt Lake City, as they disclosed the dosing of the initial patient in the Phase 1/2 clinical trial for REC-1245. This new chemical entity aims to treat biomarker-enriched solid tumors and lymphoma. This development marks a pivotal step in the company’s efforts to decode biology and create innovative solutions for improving lives.

news.headline: Giftify, Inc. (NASDAQ: GIFT) to present at The Benchmark Co.’s Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference in NYC on Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: In Schaumburg, IL, on December 3, 2024, Giftify, Inc. (NASDAQ: GIFT) disclosed plans to attend The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference on December 11, 2024, at the New York Athletic Club in NYC. Giftify, Inc. owns and manages popular digital platforms, such as CardCash.com and Restaurant.com, which focus on providing rewards and incentives in retail, dining, and entertainment sectors. This move signifies the Company's aim to showcase its operations to potential investors and stakeholders at the prestigious conference.

news.headline: MARA (NASDAQ: MARA) acquires wind farm in Hansford County, Texas with 240 MW interconnection capacity and 114 MW wind capacity.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, FL on Dec. 03, 2024, MARA (NASDAQ: MARA) disclosed that it has finalized a deal to purchase a wind farm in Hansford County, Texas. The wind farm boasts 240 MW of interconnection capacity and 114 MW of nameplate wind capacity. This acquisition marks a significant advancement in MARA's mission to transform untapped sustainable resources into economic assets, reach almost zero energy expenses, and facilitate wider adoption of renewable energy.

news.headline: Adeia Inc. signs multi-year IP license deal with Amazon.
news.summary: A technology company based in San Jose, California, Adeia Inc., announced on December 3, 2024, that they have signed a long-term deal with Amazon regarding Adeia's media intellectual property (IP) portfolio. This agreement, involving a significant amount of intellectual property, falls under the Nasdaq symbol ADEA.

news.headline: Achieve Life Sciences to move forward with first vaping cessation therapy following successful Phase 2 meeting with FDA.
news.summary: A significant achievement has highlighted the promise of Cytisinicline as a pioneering solution in tackling vaping addiction. This milestone underscores the potential of Cytisinicline as a leading treatment for vaping cessation. The development showcases the growing recognition of Cytisinicline's effectiveness in addressing the issue. This is a crucial step forward in providing a novel approach to combating vaping addiction - a pressing concern affecting a rising number of individuals globally.

news.headline: Kane Biotech plans to raise $3 million through private placement offering of 30 million common shares at $0.10 each.
news.summary: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, a company named Kane Biotech Inc. is planning a non-brokered private placement offering. They aim to offer a maximum of 30,000,000 common shares at a price of $0.10 per share, with the potential to generate up to $3,000,000 in total proceeds through this offering. The announcement was made on December 03, 2024, by Kane Biotech, listed on TSX-V as KNE and OTCQB as KNBIF.

news.headline: Amaero earns long-term supply deal for U.S.-melt titanium bar, enhancing domestic supply chain for advanced manufacturing.
news.summary: A significant achievement has been reached by Amaero, marking a crucial advancement in establishing a self-reliant U.S. supply chain for the additive and advanced manufacturing of titanium end-parts.

news.headline: Blockchain Intelligence Group launches TokenEyes app, a first-of-its-kind, for crypto investors/traders with counterparty risk detection.
news.summary: A new app called TokenEyes has been introduced by Blockchain Intelligence Group, offering a unique service for crypto investors and traders. TokenEyes is the first of its kind and aims to provide users with features for detecting and monitoring counterparty risks in the cryptocurrency market. This innovative app will help investors assess potential risks associated with their crypto transactions. Users can benefit from this service to make more informed decisions when dealing with cryptocurrencies. TokenEyes is expected to revolutionize risk management in the crypto industry.

news.headline: PetMeds adopts shareholder rights plan to protect interests, NASDAQ: PETS, Dec. 03, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, PetMed Express, Inc. (dba PetMeds), which is the parent company of PetCareRx and listed under NASDAQ as PETS, revealed the implementation of a limited duration shareholder rights plan by its Board of Directors. This plan, known as the Rights Plan, aims to safeguard the welfare of all PetMeds shareholders.

news.headline: Glucotrack starts clinical study for continuous glucose monitor in diabetic patients; data expected in 6-8 weeks.
news.summary: A study is currently being conducted to determine the practicality of the Company's innovative continuous blood glucose monitor in individuals suffering from diabetes. The study is anticipated to deliver results within the next 6-8 weeks.

news.headline: Heritage Distilling Co. expands into CO with Innermountain Distributing, offering award-winning brands to meet the demand.(Characters: 102)
news.summary: Heritage's acclaimed assortment of brands is now accessible in Western Colorado to meet the growing interest in craft spirits. The region's demand for these high-quality products has prompted Heritage to introduce their award-winning brands to the area, offering a variety of options to consumers. This expansion allows residents in Western Colorado to experience the exceptional craft spirits that Heritage has become known for, catering to the rising demand in the area.

news.headline: Orezone Gold Corporation releases 2023 Sustainability Report in Vancouver with focus on environmental, social, and governance achievements.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 3, 2024, Orezone Gold Corporation (TSX: ORE, OTCQX: ORZCF) released its 2023 Sustainability Report. This report showcases the Company's dedication to sustainability and highlights its accomplishments in environmental, social, and governance aspects for the year 2023.

news.headline: Porch Group's Investor Day to focus on achieving $100m Adj EBITDA target by 2026. #InvestorDay
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global unemployment rate has reached 6.7%, with over 200 million people being unemployed worldwide. The report also highlights that youth unemployment remains a major concern, with 64 million young people currently out of work. The COVID-19 pandemic has played a significant role in these numbers, leading to job losses across various industries. The report calls for immediate action to address the issues and create employment opportunities to recover from the economic impact of the crisis.

news.headline: Dentsply Sirona to join the 7th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference on December 5, 2024, at 8:20 am ET.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina, December 3, 2024 - DENTSPLY SIRONA Inc. (Nasdaq: XRAY) disclosed its participation in the upcoming 7th Annual Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference. The Company, referred to as "Dentsply Sirona," will engage in a fireside chat discussion on December 5, 2024, at 8:20 am Eastern Time.

news.headline: Research by CyberArk shows common employee behaviors pose security risks, urging a shift in access management.
news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, and Petach Tikva, Israel, CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR), the worldwide leader in identity security, revealed findings from recent employee research emphasizing the necessity to transition to a model that not only manages but also secures workforce access. The study, spanning multiple countries, indicates that prevalent employee behaviors related to sensitive and privileged data access – whether intentional or inadvertent – pose significant risks to organizations. This revelation, influenced by the surge in hybrid work setups and flexible access practices, underscores the urgency for organizations to bolster their security measures.

news.headline: Adial Pharma secures U.S. Patent 12150931 for expanding treatment of addiction based on genotype combos. #ADIL #drugdependence
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Adial Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADIL), a company specializing in addiction and related disorder treatments, disclosed the reception of patent number 12150931 from the United States Patent and Trademark Office on November 26, 2024. This patent bolsters the Company’s intellectual property portfolio.

news.headline: ACG held its 2024 AGM, focused on enhancing student creativity. Date: Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Beijing, ATA Creativity Global ("ACG"), traded as Nasdaq: AACG, a global educational services provider emphasizing creative learning experiences, conducted its 2024 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders.

news.headline: Voya Financial partners with Orion for new technology platform for financial advisors, Voya WealthPath. Integrated experience for in-plan, retail, advisory solutions for Voya Financial Advisors (VFA).
news.summary: Voya Financial, Inc. disclosed a collaboration with Orion, a leading wealthtech solutions provider, to introduce an upgraded technology platform for Voya Financial Advisors (VFA) business. The new platform, Voya WealthPath, aims to offer VFA's financial professionals with a comprehensive experience encompassing in-plan and retail advisory solutions, financial planning, and client relationships. This initiative from Voya Financial is aimed at enhancing the services for VFA, and is significant particularly for investors, as it involves integrating various aspects of financial services under one user-friendly platform. This move is expected to leverage the strengths of both companies to provide more streamlined and effective financial advice to clients.

news.headline: Vimeo appoints Ryan Weeks as Chief Information Security Officer, overseeing security, compliance, and risk management.
news.summary: Today, in New York, Vimeo (NASDAQ: VMEO) revealed the selection of Ryan Weeks as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). Commencing immediately, Ryan will oversee security, compliance, and risk management responsibilities at Vimeo. The appointment aims to fortify Vimeo's standing as a premier and secure hub for professional video creators worldwide.

news.headline: Deluxe closes $450 million senior secured notes offering, paying 8.125% interest, sold to qualified institutional buyers.
news.summary: Deluxe, a leading payments and data company, based in Minneapolis, has successfully concluded the offering of $450 million in senior secured notes due 2029. These notes, which have an interest rate of 8.125% per annum, will pay interest biannually. The offering was made to qualified institutional buyers in accordance with Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933. This move is set to bolster the company's financial standing and support its ongoing operations and growth strategy.

news.headline: IPA will report financial results & business highlights for Q2 FY2025 on December 10, 2024 at 10:30 am ET. #AI #IPA #NASDAQ
news.summary: Victoria, British Columbia - IPA (Immunoprecise Antibodies Ltd.) (NASDAQ: IPA), a biotherapeutic research and technology company utilizing AI, will hold a conference call on December 10, 2024, at 10:30 am Eastern Time. This call will cover the company's quarterly results and recent business highlights for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025. The financial results will be shared in a press release before the call. ImmunoPrecise management will lead the discussion.

news.headline: Quantum-Si launches Protein Barcoding Kit for Multiplexed Protein Screening in Branford, Conn.
news.summary: In Branford, Connecticut, Quantum-Si has unveiled a Protein Barcoding Kit designed for Multiplexed Protein Screening. This innovative kit enables simultaneous screening of multiple proteins, streamlining the process and enhancing efficiency in protein analysis. The introduction of this kit signifies a significant advancement in protein screening technology, with potential benefits including increased throughput and accuracy. This development is poised to revolutionize protein analysis, with the capability to analyze numerous proteins simultaneously.

news.headline: Zeta Global releases Zeta Economic Index (ZEI) for November 2024; Economic Index Score (EIS) up to 70.9 points.
news.summary: Zeta Global, a leading AI-Powered Marketing Cloud company traded on NYSE under ZETA, unveiled the Zeta Economic Index (ZEI) for November 2024. This index, among the pioneering AI-driven economic indicators, leverages Zeta's exclusive Generative AI technology and live data from more than 240 million American consumers to depict the present condition and path of the US economy. In November, the primary gauge of US economic well-being, the Economic Index Score (EIS), surged to 70.9 points.
